name: Retry on Error
uri: N/A — no route change; triggers GET /api/documents
notes: Rendered only when DocumentGrid.state.error is non-null; the entire errorContainer div is conditionally displayed via {error && this.renderError()}.
onClick fires handleRefresh() (line 612) which delegates immediately to loadDocuments() — no additional state check occurs before the API call.
loadDocuments() sets loading:true and error:null before calling fetchDocuments(), so the error banner disappears the moment Retry is clicked regardless of outcome.
On a successful retry the documents array is repopulated from GET /api/documents and the error state is cleared; on a second failure the error banner reappears with the new message.
